Farming Guide

Search a material name, then use the best-source row as the starting route. The technique column favors elite-zone spawners, high-volume spawners, reliable drop tables, and data-chip crate sources when the cache exposes those signals.

ItemTypeBest sourcePlace / Enemy / DropEffective chanceQtyTechnique signalKnown sourcesWeapon uses
Advanced Data ChipspaceJunkDurian, Renegade Elite ZoneHonarion / Renegade Crystal lvl 76 / Advanced Data Chip100%1-2Elite-zone route: Renegade Elite Area in Durian; Farm Renegade Crystal lvl 76; Reliable drop table100
Alien AlloysspaceJunkAureus Sidus lvl 90Level 90 / Alien Alloy100%1-5Reliable drop table110
Big Metal ScrapspaceJunkBionic Queen lvl 80Level 80 / Big Metal Scrap100%0-2Reliable drop table90
Bionic ImplantspaceJunkBionic Queen lvl 80Level 80 / Bionic Implant100%1Reliable drop table10
Brain TissuespaceJunkMother BrainLevel 56 / Brain Tissue100%1Reliable drop table10
Bug LegspaceJunkFulzar, Exterminatore + deamon lvl 96Mazim / Bionic Daemon lvl 73 / Bug Leg100%4-6Farm Bionic Daemon lvl 73; Reliable drop table20
Core ChargespaceJunkNezerian Regius ExterminatoreLevel 100 / Core Charge100%2-4Reliable drop table140
Engine PartspaceJunkAureus Sidus lvl 90Level 90 / Engine Part100%1-4Reliable drop table140
Fluxmineraln/an/an/aNo player-facing drop source found in cache.00
Fusion CorespaceJunkAdvectorianLevel 76 / Fusion Core100%1-8Reliable drop table90

HeartspaceJunkHeartDrop table / Heart100%1Reliable drop table40
